subject: Status review: meeting milestone in Auckland | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-8273
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of meeting work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Frida Kahlo and Nikola Tesla as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-8273. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coordination, planning.
